user_input: When does our DoughWorks dough contract end, and what's the plan?
retrieved_contexts:
['Notes & decisions:
- **Cheese cost rose ~8%** vs last quarter (mozzarella now S$9.20/kg from DairyCo). Target overall
  **food cost < 30%** of revenue per brand.
- Delivery commissions average **~30%** across platforms; pickup orders (lower commission) to be
  promoted via in-app banners.
- **Decision:** renegotiate the **DoughWorks** dough contract before it ends **2026-06-30**;
  target a 5% unit-price reduction or switch supplier.', '# Contracts
Supplier | Category | Item | UnitPrice_SGD | Unit | MinOrder | ContractStart | ContractEnd | PaymentTerms | Notes
DairyCo | Dairy | Mozzarella cheese | 9.2 | kg | 20 | 2025-10-01 | 2026-08-31 | Net 30 | Auto-renew, 30-day notice
DairyCo | Dairy | Cheddar cheese | 11.5 | kg | 10 | 2025-10-01 | 2026-08-31 | Net 30 | Auto-renew
DoughWorks | Bakery | Pizza dough base 12in | 0.55 | piece | 500 | 2026-01-01 | 2026-06-30 | Net 15 | RENEWAL DUE - renegotiate price (target -5%)', 'DoughWorks | Bakery | Garlic bread | 0.8 | piece | 200 | 2026-01-01 | 2026-06-30 | Net 15 | Renewal due
TomatoKing | Sauce | Pizza tomato sauce | 3.4 | L | 50 | 2025-09-01 | 2026-08-31 | Net 30 | 5% volume discount above 500L/month
PackRight | Packaging | Pizza box 12in | 0.18 | box | 5000 | 2025-07-01 | 2026-09-30 | Net 30 | Volume discount above 50k/month
PackRight | Packaging | Bowl container 750ml | 0.12 | unit | 5000 | 2025-07-01 | 2026-09-30 | Net 30 | For Green Monster bowls', '# Foodsta Kitchens — Internal Meeting Minutes (2026 Q1–Q2)

---

## Brand Strategy Review — 2026-04-20
Present: CEO, Head of Brands, Ops Manager, Finance Lead.', '# Foodsta Kitchens — Marketing & Promo Calendar (2026)

Channels: GrabFood, foodpanda, Deliveroo, plus brand social (esp. SIDES via the Sidemen).
Rule of thumb: pause any promo with negative contribution margin after 2 weeks.

---', '3. Alt Pizza to add **2 premium seasonal pizzas** for the year-end campaign.
4. Action: Finance to model Project Leaf P&L by 2026-05-05 (owner: Finance Lead).', 'Decisions:
1. **Approved** a 6-week pilot of a new healthy-bowl virtual brand ("Project Leaf") on the
   **K2 East (Tampines)** kitchen, reusing Green Monster's supply chain. Success bar:
   ≥ 1,500 monthly orders and food cost ≤ 30% by week 6.
2. **Now Pizza → Malaysia (Johor) expansion: ON HOLD.** Unit economics unclear given
   cross-border logistics and delivery-commission differences. Revisit after Project Leaf results.', '## Marketing Sync — 2026-05-28
Present: Head of Brands, Marketing Lead.

Decisions:
- Lock a **Sidemen social campaign** for SIDES in **July** (influencer reach is the brand's
  biggest lever).
- Run a **"Pizza Tuesday" 1-for-1** promo on Now Pizza for 4 weeks to lift weekday orders.
- Green Monster to push a **"New Year, Healthier You"** bundle in January.
- Track promo ROI by brand; pause any promo with negative contribution margin after 2 weeks.', 'Decisions:
1. **K4 West (Jurong)** repeatedly hit 90%+ capacity on weekends — approve hiring **2 part-time
   cooks** and shifting overflow Fat Mario orders to K1 Central on Fri–Sun.
2. Trial **EcoPack kraft bags** (S$0.09/unit) as a cheaper alternative to PackRight before the
   EcoPack contract renewal on **2026-07-31**; compare breakage and cost.
3. Roll out the v3.1 closing SOP (mandatory POS-vs-app reconciliation) to all kitchens.', "1. Turn off ovens and fryers; log final oil temperature and filter the oil.
2. Clean and sanitize all prep stations, boards, and floors.
3. Move unused fresh ingredients to the chiller; label with date; discard anything past use-by.
4. **Reconcile** the day's delivery-app orders vs the POS total; note any mismatch > S$20.
5. Cash/float check (for the few pickup orders); lock the dry store.
6. Set alarm; manager signs the **Closing Checklist**. Closing is not complete without the signature.", "5. Confirm all delivery-app tablets (GrabFood, foodpanda, Deliveroo) are online and synced to the POS.
6. Brief staff on the day's promotions and any 86'd (out-of-stock) items.", '## 5. Incident & Complaint Handling

- A customer complaint about a wrong/missing item → issue a refund or remake via the platform;
  log it in the **Complaint Tracker** with brand, item, and root cause.
- If complaints for one item exceed **3 in a day**, 86 the item and escalate to the brand lead.
- Any food-safety incident (foreign object, allergic reaction) → stop sales of that item,
  preserve a sample, and notify the Ops Manager and HR within 1 hour.

## 6. Capacity & Escalation', '1. Manager unlocks, disarms alarm, signs the **Opening Checklist**.
2. Check chiller and freezer temperatures: chiller **0–4°C**, freezer **−18°C or below**.
   Log readings. If out of range for >30 min, discard affected fresh items and raise a ticket.
3. Turn on ovens (pizza ovens to **280°C**), fryers (oil to **175°C**), and prep stations.
4. Verify stock against the par-level sheet; flag any item below par to the purchasing lead.']
response:
- The DoughWorks dough contract ends on **2026-06-30**.
- The plan is to renegotiate the contract before it ends, with a target of a 5% unit-price reduction or to switch suppliers.
reference: The DoughWorks dough contract ends on 2026-06-30. The plan is to renegotiate it for about a 5% unit-price reduction, or switch supplier.

   cross-border logistics and delivery-commission differences. Revisit after Project Leaf results.', 'K2 East | Tampines | Green Monster, Alt Pizza | 450 | 8500 | Active (Project Leaf pilot site)

Present: Head of Brands, Marketing Lead.

- Lock a **Sidemen social campaign** for SIDES in **July** (influencer reach is the brand's
  biggest lever).
- Run a **"Pizza Tuesday" 1-for-1** promo on Now Pizza for 4 weeks to lift weekday orders.
- Green Monster to push a **"New Year, Healthier You"** bundle in January.
- Track promo ROI by brand; pause any promo with negative contribution margin after 2 weeks.', 'Alt Pizza | Premium Pizza | GrabFood, Deliveroo | 32 | Truffle Pizza | 4100 | Highest AOV

- If a kitchen exceeds **90% of daily order capacity** before 7pm, the Ops Manager may shift
  overflow orders for shared brands to the nearest kitchen.
- K4 West (Jurong) is currently the closest to capacity and should be watched on weekends.', 'Decisions:
1. **K4 West (Jurong)** repeatedly hit 90%+ capacity on weekends — approve hiring **2 part-time
   cooks** and shifting overflow Fat Mario orders to K1 Central on Fri–Sun.
2. Trial **EcoPack kraft bags** (S$0.09/unit) as a cheaper alternative to PackRight before the
   EcoPack contract renewal on **2026-07-31**; compare breakage and cost.
3. Roll out the v3.1 closing SOP (mandatory POS-vs-app reconciliation) to all kitchens.', 'Notes & decisions:
- **Cheese cost rose ~8%** vs last quarter (mozzarella now S$9.20/kg from DairyCo). Target overall
  **food cost < 30%** of revenue per brand.
- Delivery commissions average **~30%** across platforms; pickup orders (lower commission) to be
  promoted via in-app banners.
- **Decision:** renegotiate the **DoughWorks** dough contract before it ends **2026-06-30**;
  target a 5% unit-price reduction or switch supplier.', '3. Alt Pizza to add **2 premium seasonal pizzas** for the year-end campaign.
4. Action: Finance to model Project Leaf P&L by 2026-05-05 (owner: Finance Lead).', '## 5. Incident & Complaint Handling

- A customer complaint about a wrong/missing item → issue a refund or remake via the platform;
  log it in the **Complaint Tracker** with brand, item, and root cause.
- If complaints for one item exceed **3 in a day**, 86 the item and escalate to the brand lead.
- Any food-safety incident (foreign object, allergic reaction) → stop sales of that item,
  preserve a sample, and notify the Ops Manager and HR within 1 hour.

## 6. Capacity & Escalation', 'LabelIt | Packaging | Brand sticker roll | 22 | roll | 50 | 2026-01-15 | 2026-12-31 | Net 30 | Per-brand artwork
# Brands
Brand | Category | Platforms | AvgOrderValue_SGD | TopItem | MonthlyOrders | Notes
SIDES by the Sidemen | Chicken & Sides | GrabFood, foodpanda, Deliveroo | 24.5 | Loaded Fries | 9800 | Strongest social lever (Sidemen audience)
Now Pizza | Pizza | GrabFood, foodpanda | 28 | Pepperoni 12in | 7200 | Weekday-sensitive', '| Jun | Now Pizza | "Pizza Tuesday" 1-for-1 | 4 weeks, Tuesdays only | Weekday order lift |
| Jul | SIDES | Sidemen social campaign | Influencer reach + limited menu | Brand awareness + new users |
| Sep | Alt Pizza | Truffle season | 2 premium seasonal pizzas | Premium AOV |
| Nov | All brands | 11.11 platform sale | Platform-funded discounts | Volume spike |
| Dec | All brands | Year-end festive sets | Party bundles | Volume + catering leads |', '# Foodsta Kitchens — Operations SOP Handbook (v3.1, 2026)

Applies to all cloud kitchens: K1 Central (Tanjong Pagar), K2 East (Tampines),
K3 North (Woodlands), K4 West (Jurong). Brands: SIDES by the Sidemen, Now Pizza,
Alt Pizza, Green Monster, Fat Mario.

---

## 1. Daily Opening SOP']
response:
- The decision about expanding Now Pizza to Malaysia (Johor) is **ON HOLD**.
- The unit economics are unclear due to cross-border logistics and delivery-commission differences.
- The plan is to revisit the expansion after reviewing the results of Project Leaf.
reference: The Now Pizza expansion to Johor, Malaysia is ON HOLD. Unit economics are unclear given cross-border logistics and delivery-commission differences; it will be revisited after the Project Leaf results.
